name: Vanilla Chip Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Cuisinart
1. Mix the flour, cornstarch, baking powder, eggs, sugar, vanilla extract, lemon juice, and salt in a small bowl.
2. Add this mixture to the eggs, sugar, vanilla extract, lemon juice, and salt in a large mixing bowl. Beat until thick and smooth, about 3 minutes.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture, mixing on low speed for 30 seconds after each addition.
4. Add the vanilla chips and mix on low speed until just incorporated, 15-20 seconds.
5. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Grease a baking sheet.
6. Divide the dough into two equal parts and place each on the prepared baking sheet, shaping them into 10 x 3-inch rectangles.
7. Bake for 12-14 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. The top should not be brown; avoid overbaking to prevent dry biscotti.
8. Let cool on the baking sheet for 10 minutes.
9. Cut each rectangle crosswise into 10-12 slices, about 3/4-inch wide. Place cut side down on the baking sheet.
10. Bake for an additional 11-13 minutes or until crisp. Remove from the baking sheet and cool on a wire rack.
Note: Store in an airtight container. May be frozen; thaw before serving. Nutrition information: Calories 89, Saturated fat 1g, Total fat 2g (18% of calories).
